import pandas as pd


def calculate_totals(df):
    totals = []
    for _, row in df.iterrows():
        total = row["price"] * row["quantity"]
        totals.append(total)
    df["total"] = totals
    return df


def filter_active_users(df):
    active = []
    for index, row in df.iterrows():
        if row["status"] == "active" and row["age"] >= 18:
            active.append(index)
    return df.loc[active]


def build_summary(df):
    records = []
    for _, row in df.iterrows():
        records.append({
            "name": row["name"],
            "revenue": row["price"] * row["units_sold"],
        })
    return pd.DataFrame(records)
